Developing Youth Through Sport

Faith • Excellence • Community

A Christian-based academy moving youth from the streets onto the pitch since 1996. Professional coaching, life skills, and hope for ages 6-20 in Mabelreign, Harare.

Register via WhatsApp Support Us
Established in 1996 in Mabelreign, Harare

More than a club. A calling.

Whitehead Vultures Academy of Sports is a Christian-based sports academy with 30 active members aged 6-20 years. We draw talent from Harare, Chitungwiza, Ruwa, Marondera and Norton.

Our goal is simple: move youth from the streets onto the pitch, providing a healthy alternative to drugs and alcohol while raising awareness about disease burden through sport.

1996
Founded
30+
Athletes
6-20
Years Old

Mission

To create a sports academy that is faith based to promote, inform and educate the youth of Mabelreign and Harare as a whole.

Vision

To create a better healthier lifestyle for the youth through excellence in the performance of Sport that cuts across national, regional, cultural and social-economic boundaries.

Core Values

  • Excellence
  • Passion
  • Evangelism
  • Innovation & artistic creativity
  • Diversity & inclusivity
  • Sportsmanship
  • Organizational governance

Our Programs

Professional training in a safe and conducive learning environment with performance evaluation, development matches, and life skills learning.

Football

Technical mastery, tactical awareness and teamwork for boys and girls.

Basketball

Skills development, conditioning and competitive play.

Volleyball

Coordination, communication and competitive spirit.

Athletics

Speed, endurance and field events for all-round athletes.

Community Impact

More Than Sport

We use sport as a vehicle for community engagement, holding themed fundraising tournaments with health authorities, facilitating workshops on key health issues, and leadership seminars for every child.

  • ✓

    Increased knowledge on health problems

    Workshops with local health authorities and targeted education.

  • ✓

    Improved response to disease burden

    Awareness campaigns integrated into tournaments and training.

  • ✓

    Sport as integral part of fight against substance abuse

    Providing a healthy, disciplined alternative for Harare youth.

30

and on the pitch

Partner With Us – Sponsor the Next Generation

The growth of Whitehead Vultures Academy is reliant on sponsorship and partnership with critical stakeholders. Since 1996, we've used sport to fight disease burden and substance abuse in Harare, reaching youth in Mabelreign, Chitungwiza, Ruwa, Marondera and Norton.

Kit & Equipment Sponsor

Provide training kits, footballs, bibs, cones for 30+ athletes aged 6-20

Tournament & Health Workshop Sponsor

Fund themed fundraising sports tournaments with health authorities and leadership seminars

Development Sponsor

Support coaching workshops, transport to development matches, and life skills learning programs

Our academy runs regular workshops to raise awareness on key health issues and facilitate dialogue in the community.

  • ✓ Increased health knowledge
  • ✓ Reduced substance abuse
  • ✓ Sport as a vehicle for hope
